profile.name: Mahnoor Sarfraz
profile.tagline: Building fast, reliable web and mobile applications, and adding AI-powered features when they genuinely improve the product.
profile.about: I'm a Full-Stack Developer specializing in the MERN stack, Next.js, and React Native, with hands-on experience integrating AI and LLM features using OpenAI and Google Gemini. I focus on writing clean, maintainable code that solves real business problems.

about.journey: I've worked as a Junior React and React Native Developer at TechsArk, building features for Qafalah — a production B2B platform used for visa processing and sponsorship transfer services. Alongside that, I've built several AI-powered projects on my own — including an autonomous research agent, an AI code reviewer, and a multimodal AI pipeline for document verification — combining my full-stack skills with practical LLM integration.

achievements.title: 861/1,773 — HackerRank Orchestrate 2026
achievements.description: Built a multimodal AI pipeline for automated damage claim verification using Python and the Google Gemini API, combining image analysis and language understanding to process and validate claims.

achievements.title: 2nd Position — C++ Problem Solving Competition
achievements.description: Won 2nd position in a university-level C++ problem-solving competition, solving algorithmic and logic-based coding challenges under time constraints.

experience.description: Working on Qafalah, a B2B platform for managing visa processing and Tanazul (sponsorship transfer) services.
responsibilities: Contributing to an admin dashboard system handling company records, employee management, service pricing, sales tracking, and agent workflows.
Building responsive, reusable UI components across web and mobile using React and React Native.
Integrating REST APIs to support real-time business operations.

experience.description: Completed a 6-month Frontend Development internship building responsive, user-friendly interfaces.
responsibilities: Built interfaces using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and React.js.
Gained hands-on experience in component-based development and REST API integration.
Used Git version control in collaborative team workflows.

projects.title: Autonomous Research Agent
projects.description: An AI research agent that plans, searches, reads, synthesizes, and fact-checks information without manual intervention, turning a single research question into a fully-sourced, fact-checked report.
features: Autonomous web searching and information synthesis
projects.architecture: The agent uses a graph-based architecture where different nodes represent specialized agents (Planner, Searcher, Writer, Fact-Checker). It uses LangGraph to manage state and transitions between these agents.
projects.challenges: One of the biggest challenges was handling the trade-off between speed and accuracy. I implemented a parallel searching mechanism to speed up data collection while maintaining strict verification loops.
futureImprovements: Support for local LLMs via Ollama

projects.title: MERN Estate
projects.description: Full-stack real estate platform with property listings and management, built on the MERN stack.
projects.architecture: Classic MERN stack with a RESTful API. The frontend is built with React and Redux for state management, while the backend uses Node.js and Express with MongoDB as the database.
projects.challenges: Managing complex state for property filters and ensuring efficient image handling were the primary challenges.
futureImprovements: In-app messaging between buyers and sellers
Integration with Mapbox for location-based search

projects.title: AI-Powered Code Reviewer
projects.description: Tool that gives instant code analysis and feedback, helping developers catch issues and improve code quality quickly.
projects.architecture: The tool sends code snippets to an OpenAI model with a specialized prompt for code review. The results are parsed and displayed with syntax highlighting.
projects.challenges: Providing relevant feedback without overwhelming the user and keeping the response time low were key focus areas.

projects.title: Prescripto
projects.description: Doctor appointment booking web application for managing patient bookings and schedules.
features: Admin dashboard for managing doctors and appointments
projects.architecture: Built using the MERN stack. It uses a monolithic architecture for simplicity and ease of deployment.
projects.challenges: Implementing the scheduling logic to avoid double bookings was the most interesting challenge.
